---
title: Table (Great Tables)
sidebar: components
preview: '<div class="p-3 w-100 h-100"><table class="w-100 my-0"><thead><tr><th>Product</th><th>Revenue</th><th>Margin</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Essentials</td><td>$184K</td><td style="background:#f8d7da">18%</td></tr><tr><td>Pro</td><td>$352K</td><td style="background:#fff3cd">29%</td></tr><tr style="background:#e7f5ff;font-weight:600"><td>Enterprise</td><td>$421K</td><td style="background:#d1e7dd">33%</td></tr></tbody></table></div>'
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/outputs/great-tables/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-preview.py
    height: 410
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQEsZ1SAnC5dKCAEygGdk+7LgB0IAM2akYyAObM4UCgH0KUAEYAbOPwZNWyAOIAVIhtLEiMLkV4VcW0RKmz5ileq28svABZ0IuMi6LGzy3HDMSjIUjpLSvv64WHAAHujyvDqMIcgArnSihRC8UJ7IALxCWAAiilAAYsywcAAUosgdyCDtnb3CYOmkXLnEMbTA-QCimdQUdKW8-UT9AAoauYuEyKuSS9tgRgowm8tgk5QR6XS8cP0AugQ9vR398gBu1Lm34wCMABwAFgADCCiAAmABsAHYQUCiABmACsYNh4IAnBDUcgAWCfrCHk9nv1BmI6GMUMB4fCsRC8aDkHiUfSocD6T94Wj8Y8IM9Ov0YFBmDJ-P0KUCsP8iOKwfCpVgwWi5WDEXKqQSebz9nJSAB3Cg+UXIYDioF-OU-AFKn5EAC0JtlyGlUPVvQAvqIAJRFUT5HBQGRwJSkdAUXgtOYULTlfoGVxsIwebR7UkaDSJ8pGZhfL0QIoAATCXAiURi4TEyBKnncmlaHsQhPkFFyzB5bQ1vOMLUr2iIkh10HgSjIGmjA0kw1G-RzmuQWFUaiUPgUReYbZnvQjUf6AEVcoKqMwNIFBhO2OgImIWAKIMRvtz151eLk1Ju4KOAEpwD4QL5EElk9Q6A0MlcCITguGQXAFGYG1SA+GCoMFFxdX1JZCV6adNTndQlFsZ8lygLgWjTNQ4BHHYhhGMZMN5bCF14DgIAgCJiPUMjR3qfxOGIeYNBOZBh1yGBinKCYwHeT4732f8xlOAUhRFMA7ho54sGHXglBIsi1wfZAJJ-N9+k-b8vj2GTRxWSRSVk5B5OFCBRwAWUFey9m1PUfFHABNUgvOQjz+nQzoVN6LAxBgZRiGbMJiFwFpBOE3hRNeL9JL2YkrLJe4iCLHiBT48o4QEqQOFGDMszgELOjCiKlHPZhb0oeLSHWRLkrAOzFNOdzUKUnK4DyhZyh+KqOiwHhVCHFqWB0h8EpE-kXK6oLeQ4LQKCodqAGIxD+LgoR4dKwB2sQxHhYgRC2fotq4H44AOy6XV0rgpCgfxRPFH4VUdLAkSe3lRtnedcLsLRZvXWx7DfYBIa0MKgI0NpjvusREVOqcbFBuA51SCgWh1OA6BkHwKFHNQWsuj1-vXMxiEUOhyCS2msHJrg4r7JLgABZT701QGsGDZQ+xB5g6HQfwZBafngd4Uhm1vJQIFIKgWisJGACp1YAZTlhq4EQTXkAASVTDYKCaOYPmQABHPdWAiI89O0XINFDKcVJzLYwDsc9aG93GwFdIhwAHBAUHEuBbboeR4EoLwKBSCgvbIC4aHDuQFAoG1508cpColP4sCBUQvZ9sPUCoRPA7uIA
    height: 410
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-n+yGA4KwIKIsuhKIVWGh2JV0LRKvppMFQuOclIAHcKD4pTKsODgSrAaCNYCiABaWXg5XIRXw3UDAC+ogAlKVRBh0EoitVkEUcFAZHAlGJtnQuO1wpForFOmByp53Jo-mA-UQlhQtFUhgZXGwjB5tEMAxBSlw4GJkAtmN9mO1-FE4sgU92bNpeHRyH7EGSAAIJRvJWJkxvNrPaHNadqjskDeQUMLMQWdPX6nrGdqL3jxY3QeBKMgaUvDUbjSZ1g8DLCqNRKHwKad75-6osloYAEUwjFKhmA0QJKTGCZ2CSMQWFFCBiDzAVfyFXgwjUf84FvAAlOBvggX4iEpak3zoDQaVwIhOC4ZBcAUZhHVIdtHQYsUXGNU01nXfUnzQ191CUWxMM-KAkw0dQ4BvA5SGgx9eKFQT314DgIAgJJ2kktRpNvJp-E4Yhlg0C5kGvMIYDKKppjAL4fhQ45SJpI4RTFCV6zAR5+N--VJl6zGIRRhys1WsHlrhmskI12uAUEvO+snaZ6LBSHQZR9ap5g6HQfwZFXc3umU4TwmYZClAgUgqHaKwMwAKiDgBlT3kMQEPkAASQ0bZbFaJZvmQABHEDWCSCDkHkDCNAoXY-XJ5A61KYNw3ydB2mDUM6AHNskjrPYwDsVbaBbkWKDAb0iHAC8EBQWy4HTuh5HgSgvAoUXm7IG4aEHuQFAoR0308KoxrlYFLVEZvW4H1AqGn71HiAA
    height: 410
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/outputs/great-tables/
  contents:
  - title: great_tables.shiny.output_gt
    href: https://github.com/posit-dev/great-tables/blob/main/great_tables/shiny.py
    signature: output_gt(id, placeholder=False)
  - title: great_tables.shiny.render_gt
    href: https://github.com/posit-dev/great-tables/blob/main/great_tables/shiny.py
    signature: render_gt(fn)
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

[Great Tables](https://posit-dev.github.io/great-tables/) creates polished presentation tables with headers, annotations, value formatting, color scales, and targeted styles. Use a [data grid](../data-grid/index.qmd) instead when users need to sort, filter, select, or edit the data.

Install Great Tables with `pip install great-tables`, then:

1. Build and return a `GT` object from a function decorated with `@render_gt`.
2. In Express, the decorated function creates its output automatically.
3. In Core, add `output_gt("id")` to the UI and give the decorated function the same name.

Shiny reruns the function whenever any reactive values it reads change, so the table can respond to inputs just like other outputs. See the [Great Tables user guide](https://posit-dev.github.io/great-tables/get-started/) for more formatting and styling options.
